'''madhuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:qof|qof]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-dh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qof|qof]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| madhuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mædhiyith|mædhiyith]] || [[word:mædhiyij|mædhiyij]] || [[word:mædhiyish|mædhiyish]] || [[word:mædhiyi|mædhiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:madhudhuyuth|madhudhuyuth]] || [[word:madhudhuyuj|madhudhuyuj]] || [[word:madhudhuyush|madhudhuyush]] || [[word:madhudhuyu|madhudhuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:madhuyuth|madhuyuth]] || [[word:madhuyuj|madhuyuj]] || [[word:madhuyush|madhuyush]] || [[word:madhuyu|madhuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:madhufyuth|madhufyuth]] || [[word:madhufyuj|madhufyuj]] || [[word:madhufyush|madhufyush]] || [[word:madhufyuf|madhufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:madhuyuthu|madhuyuthu]] || [[word:madhuyuju|madhuyuju]] || [[word:madhuyushu|madhuyushu]] || [[word:madhuyuku|madhuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:madhuyuth|madhuyuth]] || [[word:madhuyuj|madhuyuj]] || [[word:madhuyush|madhuyush]] || [[word:madhuyu|madhuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:madhuyuthul|madhuyuthul]] || [[word:madhuyujul|madhuyujul]] || [[word:madhuyushul|madhuyushul]] || [[word:madhuyukul|madhuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:madhuyuthuthu|madhuyuthuthu]] || [[word:madhuyujuju|madhuyujuju]] || [[word:madhuyushushu|madhuyushushu]] || [[word:madhuyuku|madhuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:madhuyuthun|madhuyuthun]] || [[word:madhuyujun|madhuyujun]] || [[word:madhuyushun|madhuyushun]] || [[word:madhuyukun|madhuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:madhuyuthuoro|madhuyuthuoro]] || [[word:madhuyujuoro|madhuyujuoro]] || [[word:madhuyushuoro|madhuyushuoro]] || [[word:madhuyukuoro|madhuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
